history.content:
<thought>
The cell directly in front of me (north, row 5 col 3) is lava (L), so I cannot move forward. The cell to my right (east, row 6 col 4) is a floor (.), while the cell to my left is a wall (#). I should turn right to face east, which will allow me to move toward the goal G that is located to the northeast.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north (^). The cell directly ahead (row 5, col 3) is floor (.), so it is safe to move forward. The goal G is located two cells north and two cells west, so moving north is the right direction.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The agent is facing north. The cell directly ahead (row 5, col 3) is floor (.), which is safe. The goal is located to the northwest (row 5, col 1). Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal, and from there I can turn left to head west toward G. No lava or wall is immediately in front.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is to my left (west). The cell directly ahead (north) is a wall '#', so I cannot move forward. I need to turn left to face west, where the cell is a safe floor '.'. Then I can move toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is two cells ahead (north) from my current position, with a safe floor '.' in between. The cell directly in front of me is floor, not wall or lava. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal, and I can reach it in another forward move afterward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal G is directly in front of me (north). There are no walls or lava blocking the way; the cell ahead is G. I can move forward to reach the goal and complete the mission.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
